notes: The file is a self-contained addition-formula analogue of MulByIntSamePlace.lean: it duplicates the three private value-bridge lemmas verbatim (pV_aeval_sub_eval_lt_one, pV_algebraMap_sub_evalAt_lt_one, pV_bivariate_bridge) from that file since they are private there. The general-isogeny section (IsogGeneral, roughly lines 863–1315) mirrors the addIsog-keyed section structurally, producing a fully duplicated pair of transfer chains; the public API (comap_pointValuation_isog_eq_affine, comap_pointValuation_isog_eq_affine_y, isog_coords_at_affine_of_decomp, isog_coords_at_affine_of_decomp_slope) is the one consumed by downstream files. No sorry, no set_option maxHeartbeats.
